title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: mdadm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for mdadm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The mdadm packages contain a utility for creating, managing, and monitoring Linux multiple disk (MD) devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): mdadm device name limit set to 127 (JIRA:RHEL-97802)  [8.10.z] Mounting an md device may fail during boot from mdadm's claim on the device not being released before systemd attempts to mount (JIRA:RHEL-59180)  [rhel8.10.z] Segmentation fault when running mdadm --assemble with --metadata specified (JIRA:RHEL-82267)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for mdadm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The mdadm packages contain a utility for creating, managing, and monitoring Linux multiple disk (MD) devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): mdadm device name limit set to 127 (JIRA:RHEL-97802)  [8.10.z] Mounting an md device may fail during boot from mdadm's claim on the device not being released before systemd attempts to mount (JIRA:RHEL-59180)  [rhel8.10.z] Segmentation fault when running mdadm --assemble with --metadata specified (JIRA:RHEL-82267)
